primary_metric.name: unsafe_acceptance_rate
primary_metric.denominator: all applied RELY decisions, including RELY from PARTIAL packages

accounting_rules: PARTIAL RELY applications enter the primary denominator
REFUSE and ESCALATE are never silently recoded as safe acceptance
application-level and seam-level results are reported separately
escalation and certified useful yield are always co-reported
no arm may improve its headline metric by changing the denominator
stop_rule: no efficacy analysis before every domain and stratum quota closes and role separation passes
blindness: adjudicators receive contracts, protected vocabulary, evidence, and candidate or typed exit without arm identity
logic_freeze: FRSL-1 remains frozen unless at least three foreign-authored seams from two authors fail only for the same missing grammar primitive
promotion_blockers: clean engine commit frozen before first intake
